source: nemo_read p7 placeholder (biomass+wood Max Imports per-AMS extension)
note: PLACEHOLDER (Stage 5: extend Maximum Imports on Resources\Primary\Biomass and Resources\Primary\Wood to all 11 AMS so the AccumulatedAnnualDemand for F26 Biomass-to-Charcoal and F58 Wood-to-Charcoal can be supplied. Same authoring shape as Malaysia sugarcane and Vietnam coconut Max Imports fixes from 2026-05-11.)
